message:
test: Add E2E and logging format tests

New test coverage:
- e2e_history_test.rs: History command E2E validation
- log_capture_test.rs: Test helper for capturing tracing output
- logging_format_test.rs: Validate log format switching
- Extended e2e_cost_test.rs and e2e_usage_test.rs coverage

These tests verify the new logging infrastructure works correctly
across different formats and output destinations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
